description_long: This object is a wooden paddle with a broad, rounded blade and a short, straight handle. The blade features natural wood grain patterns with prominent brown and tan striations, giving it a rustic appearance. The handle is decorated with a black and white wavy pattern near its base, adding a distinct visual accent. The paddle appears to be carved from a single piece of wood, with smooth, gently curved edges and a flat surface. The back of the blade is unadorned, showcasing uninterrupted wood grain, while the front displays the decorative band. There are no visible fasteners, logos, or attachments, and the surface appears well-finished with no obvious signs of wear or damage.
description: A wooden paddle with a rounded blade, natural wood grain, and a short handle featuring a black and white wavy pattern. The surface is smooth and well-finished, with no visible wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the paddle's thin profile and the curvature of the blade and handle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded blade, natural wood grain, and the black and white wavy pattern on the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness and curvature of the paddle.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted wood grain on the blade and the plain handle without decorative elements.
attribute_handle_type: straight, short, cylindrical handle with a decorative band
attribute_blade_design: rounded, broad blade with a smooth edge and natural wood grain pattern
